name: @autorank/cursor-mcp
description: Cursor MCP wrapper for AutoRank content ideas.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "require('fs').chmodSync('dist/server.js', 0o755)"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && vitest run src/stdio.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:prod: npm run build && AUTORANK_RUN_PROD_E2E=1 vitest run src/prod.e2e.test.ts --testTimeout=420000
scripts.test:all: npm run type-check && npm test && npm run test:e2e
